items.title: Checkout conversion discovery
items.name: Checkout conversion discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether payment-method ordering, buyer trust cues, or approval recovery is the largest remaining drag on legitimate payment conversion.
items.opportunity: Clarify where legitimate demand is lost before capture and which checkout improvements move the largest merchant cohorts fastest.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve checkout completion, local method relevance, and payment approval performance for scaled merchants.

riskFocus.question: Which changes most increase successful payment conversion for legitimate buyers?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Better method ordering and lower-friction checkout UX will increase captured volume faster than isolated visual changes.

plannedActivities: Compare abandonment and approval rates by payment method and region.
Review conversion gaps between hosted and embedded surfaces.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which checkout and orchestration patterns become the default Q2 rollout for strategic merchants.

items.title: Recurring revenue recovery discovery
items.name: Recurring revenue recovery discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether recurring-revenue loss comes more from payment failure, weak dunning, or pricing-model operability constraints.
items.opportunity: Clarify which product changes most improve recovered revenue and reduce monetization change friction for recurring businesses.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve recurring collections, failed-payment recovery, and pricing-model operability.

riskFocus.question: Do recurring businesses gain more from better collection recovery or easier pricing control?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Improved invoice-state clarity and recovery logic will unlock more short-term revenue than pricing UX improvements alone.

plannedActivities: Review failed-payment recovery by invoice and subscription cohort.
Map the slowest recurring pricing change workflows.
Test revised collections and dunning controls with target accounts.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which billing and recovery workflows become standard for recurring growth accounts in Q2.

items.title: Connect activation discovery
items.name: Connect activation discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether activation drag comes more from verification remediation, capability-state confusion, or payout readiness gaps.
items.opportunity: Clarify which onboarding and operator changes most improve platform activation without increasing review burden.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve connected-account activation, remediation clarity, and payout reliability for platform operators.

riskFocus.question: Which activation blockers are most responsible for delayed first earnings events?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Platforms lose more activation from unclear remediation and capability-state confusion than from raw verification volume alone.

plannedActivities: Review remediation drop-off by requirement type.
Map operator escalation points before first payout.
Test revised account-state explanations and onboarding guidance.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which activation and remediation patterns become the standard Connect onboarding flow in Q2.

items.title: Finance trust discovery
items.name: Finance trust discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether finance trust breaks most around tax registration readiness, reporting discrepancies, or reconciliation investigation effort.
items.opportunity: Clarify which changes most improve adoption of Stripe's finance automation products in control-sensitive accounts.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve tax readiness, reporting trust, and reconciliation clarity for recurring and finance-sensitive customers.

riskFocus.question: What most improves operator confidence in tax and revenue outputs?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Confidence rises fastest when tax, recognition, and reconciliation outcomes can be explained in one operator workflow.

plannedActivities: Review top month-end support escalations in recurring accounts.
Map the most common tax registration and reporting breakdowns.
Test unified investigation flows across tax, revenue, and reconciliation.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which trust-building finance workflows become default for strategic recurring accounts in Q2.
